entry.value: sailpoint.connector.InvalidRequestException: [ InvalidRequestException ] [ Possible suggestions ] Ensure that value of 'User DN' is correct. [ Error details ] Invalid name: Knight

Exception occurred while executing the RPCRequest: Errors returned from IQService. "Attribute DistinguishedNamedoes not contain expected character ,. Value supplied : Randy KnightAttribute DistinguishedNamedoes not contain expected character ,. Value supplied : Randy Knight. HRESULT:[0x80131500]"
